calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Willful Disobedience Of Court Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Sheehan. Buty & Curliano, appearing for defendant defendant The Regents of the University of California, Telephone 510-267-3040;
No other appearance.

Mini minutes: The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Dismiss For Willful Disobedience Of Court Order Compelling Plaintiffs Deposition is unopposed and is GRANTED. On May 3, 2018, this Court granted plaintiff's former counsel's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel. In the Motion, plaintiff's former counsel specifically warned plaintiff that the case may be dismissed for his failure to appear at deposition. (Rice Decl., 9). On May 25, 2018, this Court ordered plaintiff to appear for deposition on or before June 25, 2018. Regents noticed plaintiff's deposition for June 19, 2018. Plaintiff failed to appear at his deposition. For these reasons, the Court finds that plaintiff has willfully disobeyed a Court order and the action is ordered dismissed. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Continued To Nov-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Michael D. Harris
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eileen Rice, Esq. 510-267-3000 of Buty & Curliano LLP for Defendant THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Michael D. Harris.

The motion is unopposed and will be granted, with plaintiff to appear for deposition on or before June 25, 2018. Sanctions were not requested by the moving party and will not be awarded.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
